Files modified (src/feature.py, tests/test_sub.py) match expected; wall-time 9/12 min under budget. All 6 LOW tasks completed cleanly with disjoint docs files; batch verifier ran once at Phase Transition (PASS) as expected. Commit count 15 sits at the top of the allowed range due to per-task orchestrator state commits, but within bounds. Wall-time 13m of 18m budget (~72%) keeps cost_efficiency just under the 60% threshold for a full 1.0.
